item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, sistem hukum masih banyak terganggu oleh korupsi dan nepotisme, sehingga hak individu sering kali tidak dilindungi secara efektif.

notes: Agent A consistently rejects a one-sided society-over-rights priority and emphasizes coordination, legal protection, rural development, and anti-corruption in China. Agent B begins with conditional support for prioritizing social interests but increasingly centers weak rights implementation, corruption, rural neglect, and unequal protection, moving somewhat toward Agent A's rights-protective stance. Both agents address specific legal/rural-development claims, though the exchange partly shifts from the abstract item to comparing China and Indonesia's implementation problems.
